deliveryHandoffJustification: Consolidated operator activation packet for the live self-hosted deploy of the current pushed origin/main HEAD at build time (the operator MUST resolve the live value via git rev-parse origin/main and the local build manifest's <sourceSha> — do NOT hardcode a SHA; it was e0e7bc4f when this packet was authored 2026-06-24, and HEAD has since advanced with doc/spec-096-closeout-only commits that change no runtime payload, current tip 010a5e2f). SUPERSEDES/SUBSUMES OPS-003 for the live deploy: OPS-003 handed off GAP-06 + BUG-067-001 at the interior payload SHA 78b293cc; OPS-004 folds that payload in alongside every other runtime-relevant change now on main awaiting a self-hosted deploy + live GPU verify. This packet ships ONLY documentation (objective.md + runbook.md): the pre-deploy required config (ML_LOG_LEVEL fail-loud SST key per BUG-067-001, and the qwen3:30b-a3b synthesis model selection that supersedes the retired deepseek-r1:7b / interim gpt-oss:20b / deepseek-r1:32b), the local-operator BUILD path (GitHub CI is disabled_manually, so ./smackerel.sh build --target self-hosted via scripts/commands/build-self-hosted.sh writes dist/local-build-manifests/local-build-manifest-<sourceSha>.yaml with trustModel: local-operator, consumed identically by scripts/deploy/promote.sh), the exact PROMOTE/APPLY/VERIFY commands, the per-bug live verifications with pass signals (BUG-067-001 ML health; BUG-047-003 scope 4 Trivy re-proof at build + scope 5 live /ask; GAP-06 smackerel_surfacing_*{producer=notification} on core /metrics; BUG-064-001/002 sourced /ask answer with scenario_id=open_knowledge, num_sources>0, termination_reason!=cap_usd and no /ask prefix/snippet-dump; specs 084/087/088 GPU A/B; BUG-069-002 client-disconnect durability to Postgres+NATS), pointer-swap ROLLBACK, and Day-1 ops (first live backup + restore-drill + operate-plane SLO; offsite T3/T4 + BCDR remain WARN under offsite_required=false). The live self-hosted apply + GPU verify is the operator's call and was intentionally NOT run this session: NO build / deploy / push / CI / docker / promote / git-commit command was executed while authoring this packet (everything is operator/host-gated and out of scope). Terminates at delivered_pending_activation (mode adapter-readiness-to-packet, terminalAliases [delivered_pending_activation]); NOT promoted to done because live-runtime activation evidence is the operator's to produce at apply time. The packet stays 100% generic: no real host names, tailnet IDs, knb adapter internals, secret values, or /home/<user>/ paths; the deploy host is referred to only as self-hosted / <deploy-host> / <host-bind-address> and the operator-private adapter only as <deployment-owner>/<product>/<target>/.

implement.reason: Documentation-only ops packet (deploy-pointer). The runtime deliveries it activates already shipped on main under their own feature/bug packets (GAP-06/spec 054, BUG-067-001, BUG-047-003, BUG-064-001/002, specs 084/087/088, BUG-069-002); no new runtime code is authored here.

test.reason: No new runtime code in this packet. The activated changes carry their own in-repo tests; the remaining proofs are LIVE self-hosted GPU verifications (documented in runbook.md as operator steps with pass signals) which are the operator's to produce at apply time, not runnable from this documentation session.

chaos.reason: Scope kind is deploy-pointer; the only chaos-adjacent exercise (BUG-069-002 client-disconnect durability) is documented as a live operator verification on the self-hosted stack and defers to apply time.

stress.reason: No SLA owned by this handoff packet; operate-plane SLO capture happens on the live self-hosted stack at apply time (Day-1 ops) and is documented, not executed here.

executionHistory.summary: Authored the consolidated self-hosted activation handoff (OPS-004) for deploy source e0e7bc4f. READ-ONLY inspection only — NO build/deploy/push/CI/docker/promote/git-commit command was run. Verified against the repo: origin/main HEAD = e0e7bc4f (ahead count 0); GitHub CI workflows disabled_manually; the local-operator producer scripts/commands/build-self-hosted.sh writes dist/local-build-manifests/local-build-manifest-<sourceSha>.yaml (trustModel: local-operator) and scripts/deploy/promote.sh parses both CI and local-operator manifest shapes and forwards --config-bundle-sha/--source-sha/--trust-model; deploy/compose.deploy.yml binds core ${CORE_HOST_PORT}=41001 and ml ${ML_HOST_PORT}=41002 via fail-loud HOST_BIND_ADDRESS; routes /api/health (core liveness), /readyz (core readiness), ml /health all exist; ML_LOG_LEVEL is a required fail-loud key in ml/app/main.py::_check_required_config; config/smackerel.yaml documents the self-hosted synthesis default qwen3:30b-a3b (superseding deepseek-r1:7b/gpt-oss:20b/deepseek-r1:32b) with the validateModelEnvelopes co-residence guard; smackerel_surfacing_* families (producer/channel labels) + smackerel_surfacing_budget_remaining exist; POST /api/assistant/turn is the spec-069 transport; the referenced bug/spec dirs (BUG-047-003, BUG-064-001/002, BUG-069-002, BUG-058, specs 054/084/087/088) exist; the 5 out-of-knb follow-up bugs (BUG-034-004, BUG-076-001, BUG-095-001, BUG-073-003, and spec-077's in_progress bug) are in_progress in-repo. Documented PRE-DEPLOY required config (ML_LOG_LEVEL + qwen3 model selection), local-operator BUILD, PROMOTE/APPLY/VERIFY exact commands, per-bug live verifications with pass signals, pointer-swap ROLLBACK, Day-1 ops (first live backup + restore-drill + operate-plane SLO; offsite T3/T4 + BCDR WARN under offsite_required=false), a clearly-separated tagged-release action for BUG-058 (chrome-bridge keyless-cosign, NOT self-hosted), and an appendix of the 5 out-of-knb in-repo cert-deferred bugs. Kept the packet 100% generic (no real host names / tailnet IDs / knb internals / secrets / /home/<user>/ paths). Left the packet UNCOMMITTED for the orchestrator to commit centrally. Terminates at delivered_pending_activation; live activation is the operator's call.

notes: Deploy source SHA e0e7bc4f (current origin/main HEAD; supersedes OPS-003's 78b293cc). Consolidated self-hosted activation handoff. GitHub CI is disabled_manually -> artifact producer is the local-operator path ./smackerel.sh build --target self-hosted -> dist/local-build-manifests/local-build-manifest-<sourceSha>.yaml (trustModel: local-operator), consumed by scripts/deploy/promote.sh. PRE-DEPLOY required: ML_LOG_LEVEL (services.ml.log_level, recommended info; ML sidecar fails loud without it) AND synthesis model selection = qwen3:30b-a3b (NOT retired deepseek-r1:7b / interim gpt-oss:20b / deepseek-r1:32b; co-residence guard validateModelEnvelopes fail-loud). self-hosted ports core 41001 / ml 41002; routes /api/health (liveness), /readyz (readiness), ml /health. Live verifies close: BUG-064-001/002, specs 084/087/088, BUG-069-002, BUG-047-003 scope 5 (scope 4 CVE re-proof = Trivy gate on the freshly built core). Day-1 ops: first live backup + restore-drill + operate-plane SLO; offsite T3/T4 + BCDR WARN (offsite_required=false) = known limitation, not blocker. SEPARATE (not self-hosted): BUG-058 chrome-bridge unblocks on operator-cut tagged release (refs/tags/v*) for CI keyless-cosign to public Rekor. OUT-OF-KNB appendix (in-repo cert matter, NOT this handoff): BUG-034-004, BUG-076-001, BUG-095-001, BUG-073-003, BUG-077-002 are fix-complete/verified-green but in_progress because G022 done-cert was never run. Packet is 100% generic (no real host names / tailnet IDs / knb internals / secrets / /home/<user>/ paths) and left UNCOMMITTED for the orchestrator. No build/deploy/push/CI/docker/promote/git-commit command was run while authoring this packet.
